title: rulingia dasyphylla
intro: Rulingia dasyphylla, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, is native to Australia and is also known as the 'Kangaroo Apple'. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rulingia dasyphylla include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
